fixes.reason: Validator auto-overrides comparison_baseline from WT to mutant whenever gene_modifier and exogenous_supply are both set (validation_common.py:280-289), inverting the intended comparison.
fixes.biological_justification: The env source node baseline (gm=1.0) already sustains the VIN3/PIF4/SVP cascade; the reported mutant-vs-WT claim does not require the extra exogenous kick. Removing the exogenous aligns the encoding with the cascade biology.
